name: Instant Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Take a can of juice-packed peaches or pineapple.
2. Freeze it for several hours (place the can in the freezer).
3. Open and dump frozen contents into a food processor with a metal chopping blade.
4. Process until desired consistency.
5. Enjoy!
Note: You can also use frozen bananas; freeze them in zip-lock bags without peels. They become very creamy, like rich ice cream, but without added fat or sugar.
